body_template: One mile in — the trail settles into rhythm. Willowbend waits {miles_to_next} ahead.
{character} rests where the river bends. Old Oak stands {miles_to_next} on.
Seven miles walked. The old giant marks the turn toward Lastlight Bridge.
Nine miles down — one to go. Journey's End is almost in sight.
{character} has reached Journey's End — {total_miles} walked, start to finish.
